Title: Virtual Inaugural
Objective: Official Inaugural of the Programme

Title: Introduction to Python for Data Science
Objective: Establish the core syntax and mental model of Python programming
Topics Covered: Variables; Data types (Integers, Floats, Strings); Basic operators; Input/Output functions

Title: Control Flow & Logic
Objective: Learn how to build programs that make decisions and repeat actions
Topics Covered: Conditionals (If-Else); Boolean logic; Logical operators; Program flow

Title: Iterative Programming & Loops
Objective: Master the ability to process sequences of data efficiently
Topics Covered: For loops; While loops; Iterating over lists; Loop control statements (Break, Continue)

Title: Modular Code with Functions
Objective: Transition from scripts to reusable and maintainable functions
Topics Covered: Defining functions; Arguments and return values; Scope of variables; Documenting code

Title: Core Data Structures
Objective: Understand how Python stores collections of data for processing
Topics Covered: Lists; Tuples; Dictionaries; Sets; Selecting the right structure for the data task

Title: The Notebook Workflow
Objective: Set up a professional environment for experimentation and documentation
Topics Covered: Google Colab; Markdown for documentation; Managing cells; Exporting deliverables

Title: Working with Structured Data (CSV)
Objective: Learn to read and write common data formats used in industry
Topics Covered: Python's CSV module; Reading rows; Writing datasets; Handling headers

Title: Handling Semi-Structured Data (JSON)
Objective: Master the standard format for web data and configuration files
Topics Covered: JSON structure; Nested data; Parsing JSON strings; Converting Python dicts to JSON

Title: Data Validation & Schema Checks
Objective: Learn to fix "dirty" data early in the pipeline
Topics Covered: Handling missing values; Fixing wrong data types; Identifying inconsistent formats; Schema validation basics

Title: API Fundamentals & REST
Objective: Understand how data is fetched from modern web services
Topics Covered: HTTP methods (GET, POST); URL parameters; Request-Response cycle; REST architecture

Title: Managing API Complexity
Objective: Handle real-world challenges like security and large datasets
Topics Covered: Status codes; Authentication keys; Header management; Pagination logic

Title: End-to-End Data Fetching Pipeline
Objective: Build a script that converts live API responses into usable local datasets
Topics Covered: Python requests library; Rate limiting; Error handling; Parsing API responses into CSV/JSON

Module: Module 2: Data Analysis with NumPy & Pandas (Weeks 5-8)
Title: NumPy Arrays & Performance
Objective: Learn the foundation of numeric computation in Python
Topics Covered: NumPy Essentials; N-dimensional arrays; Array properties; Performance comparison with Python lists

Module: Module 2: Data Analysis with NumPy & Pandas (Weeks 5-8)
Title: Vectorized Operations
Objective: Master "no-loop" math for high-speed data processing
Topics Covered: Broadcasting; Element-wise operations; Aggregations (Sum, Mean, Standard Deviation); Masking

Module: Module 2: Data Analysis with NumPy & Pandas (Weeks 5-8)
Title: Numeric Manipulation & Linear Algebra Basics
Objective: Apply NumPy to common data transformation tasks
Topics Covered: Array reshaping; Transposition; Matrix multiplication basics; Generating synthetic data

Module: Module 2: Data Analysis with NumPy & Pandas (Weeks 5-8)
Title: Introduction to Pandas DataFrames
Objective: Transition from raw numbers to structured table-based analysis
Topics Covered: Pandas Core Operations; Series vs. DataFrames; Reading CSV/Excel into DataFrames; Basic inspection

Module: Module 2: Data Analysis with NumPy & Pandas (Weeks 5-8)
Title: Data Selection & Filtering
Objective: Learn to query datasets to find specific insights
Topics Covered: Boolean indexing; .loc vs .iloc; Filtering on multiple conditions; Selecting columns

Module: Module 2: Data Analysis with NumPy & Pandas (Weeks 5-8)
Title: Summarizing & Grouping Data
Objective: Perform high-level aggregations to understand data patterns
Topics Covered: Groupby operations; Pivot tables; Descriptive statistics in Pandas; Multi-index basics

Module: Module 2: Data Analysis with NumPy & Pandas (Weeks 5-8)
Title: Data Joins & Merges
Objective: Learn to combine data from multiple sources like a database
Topics Covered: Inner/Outer/Left/Right joins; Concatenation; Handling overlapping column names

Module: Module 2: Data Analysis with NumPy & Pandas (Weeks 5-8)
Title: Advanced Data Transformation
Objective: Apply complex logic across thousands of rows efficiently
Topics Covered: Apply functions; Map and Replace; Pivot and Melt; Date/Time handling

Module: Module 2: Data Analysis with NumPy & Pandas (Weeks 5-8)
Title: Text Manipulation in DataFrames
Objective: Clean and extract information from messy text fields
Topics Covered: String operations; Regex basics in Pandas; Cleaning categorical data; Standardizing labels

Module: Module 2: Data Analysis with NumPy & Pandas (Weeks 5-8)
Title: The Data Cleaning Workflow
Objective: Build a repeatable pipeline for handling real-world messy data
Topics Covered: Detecting and filling missing values; Removing duplicates; Outlier detection; Consistency checks

Module: Module 2: Data Analysis with NumPy & Pandas (Weeks 5-8)
Title: Exploratory Data Analysis (EDA) Concepts
Objective: Learn the mental model for discovering hidden patterns in data
Topics Covered: Univariate vs Multivariate analysis; Correlation analysis; Identifying trends; Forming hypotheses

Module: Module 2: Data Analysis with NumPy & Pandas (Weeks 5-8)
Title: Visualizing Data with Seaborn
Objective: Introduction to programmatic data visualization
Topics Covered: Statistical plots; Scatter plots; Histograms; Heatmaps for correlation; Matplotlib vs Seaborn

Title: Relational Database Foundations
Objective: Understand how data is stored and organized in professional environments
Topics Covered: Tables; Rows; Columns; Primary Keys; Foreign Keys; Schema design

Title: Basic SQL Querying
Objective: Learn to retrieve specific data using standard SQL syntax
Topics Covered: SELECT statement; WHERE clause; DISTINCT; LIMIT; Order By; Basic logical operators

Title: Data Types & Constraints
Objective: Deep dive into how databases ensure data integrity
Topics Covered: Numeric vs String vs Date types; NULL values; NOT NULL; UNIQUE; DEFAULT

Title: Mastering SQL Joins
Objective: Learn to query related tables to build comprehensive datasets
Topics Covered: Inner Join; Left Join; Cross Join; Self Joins; Understanding relationships (1:N, N:N)

Title: Set Operations & Subqueries
Objective: Handle complex data retrieval using nested logic
Topics Covered: Union and Union All; Intersect and Except; Basic Subqueries; Common Table Expressions (CTEs)

Title: Relational Integrity & Normalization
Objective: Learn how to design databases that prevent data redundancy
Topics Covered: Normal Forms (1NF, 2NF, 3NF); Benefits of normalization; When to denormalize for performance

Title: Advanced Aggregations
Objective: Master complex data summarization techniques
Topics Covered: Group By; Having clause; Count vs Count Distinct; Case When statements

Title: Introduction to Window Functions
Objective: Perform calculations across a set of table rows
Topics Covered: Over clause; Row_Number; Rank and Dense_Rank; Running totals

Title: Lead; Lag & Time-Series SQL
Objective: Learn to analyze data changes over time in SQL
Topics Covered: Comparing current vs previous rows; Calculating growth rates; Moving averages in SQL

Title: SQL + Python Integration
Objective: Learn to bridge the gap between databases and data science code
Topics Covered: Using SQLite/Postgres in Python; The SQL Alchemy library; Connection strings; Cursors

Title: Database Interactions & Transactions
Objective: Learn to modify and manage database state safely
Topics Covered: Insert; Update; Delete; Commit and Rollback; Basic security (SQL injection prevention)

Title: Case Study: E-commerce Analysis
Objective: Apply SQL skills to a real-world business dataset
Topics Covered: Building a complex query for user retention; SQL performance optimization; Generating business reports

Title: Descriptive Statistics
Objective: Learn the mathematical language used to describe datasets
Topics Covered: Mean; Median; Mode; Variance; Standard Deviation; Skewness; Kurtosis

Title: Probability Foundations
Objective: Understand the likelihood of events in data
Topics Covered: Basic probability; Conditional probability; Bayes Theorem; Applications in AI

Title: Discrete & Continuous Distributions
Objective: Learn to model data based on expected shapes
Topics Covered: Normal Distribution; Binomial Distribution; Poisson Distribution; Z-scores

Title: Sampling & Estimation
Objective: Learn how to draw conclusions from a subset of data
Topics Covered: Sampling methods; Central Limit Theorem; Standard Error; Confidence Intervals

Title: Hypothesis Testing Basics
Objective: Master the framework for making data-driven decisions
Topics Covered: Null vs Alternative hypothesis; P-values; Type I & II errors; Significance levels

Title: A/B Testing & Correlation
Objective: Understand how to measure relationships and experiment outcomes
Topics Covered: T-tests; Chi-square tests; Pearson Correlation; Interpreting statistical significance

Title: Principles of Visual Storytelling
Objective: Learn how to design charts that communicate insights effectively
Topics Covered: Visual hierarchy; Color theory for data; Removing clutter; Highlighting the 'So What?'

Title: Choosing the Right Chart
Objective: Master the mapping between data types and visual marks
Topics Covered: Distributions (Histograms); Comparisons (Bar charts); Trends (Line charts); Relationships (Scatter)

Title: Advanced Seaborn & Interactive Plots
Objective: Move beyond static charts for deeper exploration
Topics Covered: Facet grids; Pair plots; Introduction to interactive visualization concepts; Customizing aesthetics

Title: Introduction to BI Tools
Objective: Learn the industry standard for business dashboarding
Topics Covered: Overview of Tableau/PowerBI; Connecting to data sources; The tool interface

Title: Building Interactive Dashboards
Objective: Create visual environments for stakeholders to explore data
Topics Covered: Calculated fields; Filters; Dashboards vs Worksheets; Mapping geographic data

Title: Case Study: Executive Reporting
Objective: Synthesize statistics and visualization into a final deliverable
Topics Covered: Analyzing a dataset; Identifying 3 key insights; Presenting findings via a dashboard

Title: Introduction to Machine Learning
Objective: Understand the core concepts of predictive modeling
Topics Covered: Supervised vs Unsupervised learning; The ML lifecycle; Regression vs Classification; Scikit-learn basics

Title: Linear Regression
Objective: Master the foundation of continuous variable prediction
Topics Covered: Simple vs Multiple regression; Least Squares; Coefficients; Intercepts; Evaluation metrics (MSE, R2)

Title: Logistic Regression
Objective: Learn the standard model for binary classification
Topics Covered: Sigmoid function; Decision boundaries; Odds ratios; Multiclass classification basics

Title: Decision Trees & Overfitting
Objective: Learn the logic of tree-based models and their risks
Topics Covered: Entropy and Gini impurity; Tree depth; Overfitting vs Underfitting; Bias-Variance tradeoff

Title: Classification Evaluation Metrics
Objective: Learn to measure model performance beyond simple accuracy
Topics Covered: Confusion Matrix; Precision and Recall; F1-Score; ROC-AUC curves

Title: K-Nearest Neighbors & Distance Metrics
Objective: Understand how proximity-based models work
Topics Covered: Euclidean vs Manhattan distance; Choosing 'K'; Feature scaling importance

Title: Ensemble Learning: Random Forests
Objective: Learn to combine multiple trees for stronger performance
Topics Covered: Bagging; Bootstrapping; Feature importance; Reducing variance

Title: Ensemble Learning: Gradient Boosting
Objective: Master the intuition behind boosting for high-performance ML
Topics Covered: Boosting basics; Learning rate; Residuals; Comparing RF vs Gradient Boosting

Title: Unsupervised Learning & Clustering
Objective: Discover patterns in data without pre-defined labels
Topics Covered: K-Means clustering; Choosing clusters (Elbow method); Dimensionality reduction (PCA) basics

Title: Feature Engineering & Selection
Objective: Learn to create input variables that improve model performance
Topics Covered: Handling categorical variables (One-Hot); Scaling (Min-Max/Standard); Feature creation from dates/text

Title: Building Robust ML Pipelines
Objective: Create reusable and error-proof preprocessing + modeling workflows
Topics Covered: Scikit-learn Pipelines; Cross-validation; Hyperparameter tuning (GridSearch)

Title: Model Debugging & Error Analysis
Objective: Learn to systematically improve your model after the first build
Topics Covered: Detecting leakage; Handling imbalanced data (SMOTE/Class weights); Error analysis

Title: Introduction to GenAI & LLMs
Objective: Understand the landscape of modern AI and large language models
Topics Covered: Foundation models; How LLMs predict text; Use cases in data science; Tokens and context windows

Title: Mastering Prompt Engineering
Objective: Design prompts that follow instructions and produce reliable results
Topics Covered: System prompts vs User prompts; Zero-shot vs Few-shot; Chain of thought prompting; Structured outputs

Title: Handling Edge Cases & Consistency
Objective: Learn to make LLMs behave predictably in applications
Topics Covered: Input validation; Handling hallucinations; Designing robust instructions; Testing prompt versions

Title: The OpenAI API & Python Integration
Objective: Learn to programmatically interact with LLMs
Topics Covered: API authentication; ChatCompletion endpoint; Model parameters (Temperature, Top-P); Managing costs

Title: Designing Input-Output Contracts
Objective: Build clean interfaces between Python code and AI models
Topics Covered: Managing JSON outputs; Graceful failure handling; Retries; Parsing LLM responses into DataFrames

Title: Automating Document Workflows
Objective: Use LLMs to extract insights from unstructured data
Topics Covered: Processing support tickets; Theme extraction; Summary generation; Processing internal knowledge bases

Title: Introduction to Embeddings
Objective: Understand how to convert text into numeric vectors for search
Topics Covered: Embeddings API; Semantic similarity; Vector space; Dimensionality of embeddings

Title: Vector Databases
Objective: Learn to store and search through millions of text segments
Topics Covered: Introduction to Vector DBs; Indexing data; Querying for similarity; Chroma vs FAISS

Title: Building Semantic Search
Objective: Create a system that finds relevant documents based on meaning
Topics Covered: Hybrid search basics; Ranking results; Filtering in vector databases; Practical implementation

Title: RAG: Retrieval-Augmented Generation
Objective: Learn the core architecture for building grounded AI systems
Topics Covered: The RAG workflow; Combining retrieval with generation; Reducing hallucinations; Context windows

Title: Advanced RAG: Chunking & Retrieval
Objective: Master the technical details that make RAG systems work
Topics Covered: Document chunking strategies; Overlap logic; Top-K retrieval; Re-ranking

Title: Building AI Apps with Streamlit
Objective: Learn to build interactive web interfaces for your AI projects
Topics Covered: Streamlit basics; Creating buttons/inputs; Displaying outputs; Deploying a RAG demo

Title: Capstone Project: Problem Definition
Objective: Define a real-world problem and scope the data solution
Topics Covered: Identify dataset; Define success metrics; Architecture design; Baseline performance

Title: Capstone Project: Pipeline Build
Objective: Implement the end-to-end data processing and model pipeline
Topics Covered: Data cleaning; Feature engineering; Model training/Prompt design; Integration

Title: Capstone Project: Refinement & Evaluation
Objective: Optimize the solution and measure measurable outcomes
Topics Covered: Hyperparameter tuning; Error analysis; Evaluation on test data; Trade-off documentation

Title: Capstone Project: Final Dashboard/UI
Objective: Build the final interface for the working solution
Topics Covered: Finalizing Streamlit/Tableau interface; User experience check; Polish visualizations

Title: Capstone Project: Documentation & Ethics
Objective: Document the technical approach and ethical considerations
Topics Covered: Model limitations; Handling bias; Compliance; Final project report

Title: Final Capstone Showcase
Objective: Present the working solution and documented trade-offs
Topics Covered: Pitching the solution; Demonstrating outcomes; Q&A on technical choices
